deep_dive.title: Multi$^2$: Hierarchical Multi-Agent Decision-Making with LLM-Based Agents in Interactive Environments
deep_dive.abstract: A central goal of large language model (LLM) research is to build agentic systems that can plan, act, and adapt through sustained interaction with dynamic environments. While recent LLM-based agents exhibit impressive contextual reasoning, their long-horizon decision-making remains fragile, often suffering from objective drift, where goals and plans drift over extended interactions. We introduce Multi$^2$, a hierarchical multi-agent decision-making framework that explicitly decomposes agent behavior into complementary roles. A high-level agent (System 1) focuses on context-aware sub-goal generation using supervised fine-tuning (SFT), while a low-level agent (System 2) executes atomic actions through offline-to-online reinforcement learning (RL) in interactive environments. This separation enables stable long-horizon control, mitigates objective drift, and allows efficient adaptation. Across diverse interactive environments, Multi$^2$ consistently outperforms strong agentic baselines, demonstrating improved robustness and coordination in multi-turn interaction. Beyond performance, we introduce and release three hierarchical benchmark datasets, filling a long-standing gap in training and evaluating hierarchical decision-making for LLM-based agents.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: hierarchical multi-agent decision-making with offline-to-online RL
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 分层多智能体决策，结合离线到在线强化学习
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 分层多智能体决策，结合离线到在线强化学习
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 分层多智能体决策，结合离线到在线强化学习
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Multi^2 framework with high-level agent for sub-goal generation via SFT and low-level agent for atomic actions via offline-to-online RL, addressing objective drift in long-horizon tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 大语言模型智能体在长期决策中容易出现目标漂移。本文提出Multi^2分层多智能体框架，高层智能体通过监督微调生成上下文感知的子目标，低层智能体则通过离线到在线强化学习执行原子动作。该分解有效缓解了目标漂移，在交互式环境中展现出更强的鲁棒性和适应性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 大语言模型智能体在长期决策中容易出现目标漂移。本文提出Multi^2分层多智能体框架，高层智能体通过监督微调生成上下文感知的子目标，低层智能体则通过离线到在线强化学习执行原子动作。该分解有效缓解了目标漂移，在交互式环境中展现出更强的鲁棒性和适应性。

quick_skim.title: CONCAT: Consensus- and Confidence-Driven Ad Hoc Teaming for Efficient LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
quick_skim.abstract: Although large language model (LLM) based multi-agent systems (MAS) show their capability to solve complex tasks and achieve higher performance over single agent systems, they lead to huge computational overheads because of heavy communication between agents. Previous research has made efforts to train a sparse multi-agent graph or fine-tune a planner to orchestrate the workflow better. However, such extra training processes introduce computational costs and limit MAS to specific domains, therefore compromising their generalizability. In this paper, we propose CONCAT, a training-free multi-agent collaboration framework based on CONsensus and Confidence-driven Ad hoc Teaming to efficiently organize agent interactions. Specifically, agents are clustered based on their initial answers, and leaders of each cluster are selected based on the agents' confidence. Then, a heuristic function based on the Theory of Mind is designed to predict the collaboration benefits between every two leaders according to their answers and confidence. Finally, an ad hoc multi-agent network is organized after evicting a percentage of communications based on the predicted benefits. Experiments across three LLMs and three benchmarks show that CONCAT achieves up to 2.02x higher efficiency (accuracy/latency ratio) than LLM-Debate and outperforms training-aware methods such as AgentDropout, while reducing average latency by 50.1% on Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct, without any task-specific training.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于LLM的多智能体协作框架
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于LLM的多智能体协作框架
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于LLM的多智能体协作框架
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CONCAT proposes a training-free multi-agent collaboration framework using consensus and confidence-driven ad hoc teaming to efficiently organize LLM agent interactions.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 大语言模型多智能体系统存在通信过重问题。本文提出CONCAT，一种无需训练的多智能体协作框架，基于共识和置信度驱动的临时团队组织，有效管理智能体之间的交互。实验表明该方法在保持性能的同时显著减少通信成本，具有良好的通用性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 大语言模型多智能体系统存在通信过重问题。本文提出CONCAT，一种无需训练的多智能体协作框架，基于共识和置信度驱动的临时团队组织，有效管理智能体之间的交互。实验表明该方法在保持性能的同时显著减少通信成本，具有良好的通用性。
